meta.title: Contact — codeberg
meta.description: Get in touch with codeberg — collaborations, commissions, or just a good conversation.

intro: I take on a handful of design and build engagements each year, and I'm always happy to trade notes on code, design, and culture. Tell me what you're making.

aside.label: Good fits
aside.text: Design systems, brand-led websites, and focused products that need both design and engineering care.
